since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.53% · Gold +0.98% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.08%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +5.82%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +5.82%, MU +5.28%, TER +5.25%, LRCX +5.06%, AMAT +4.89%. Laggards: CRM -4.33%, IBM -4.08%, NOW -3.74%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.07% at $149.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
